name: Beef/Rice Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Pre-heat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Prepare the rice with water in a standard manner. Do not use salt or margarine.
3. While the rice is cooking, chop onions and garlic.
4. Saute onions gently until they are just tender.
5. Add ground beef and brown it.
6. Cook onions and ground beef for about 7 minutes. Drain off excess fat.
7. Return to medium heat.
8. Mix broccoli cheese soup and milk separately. Stir until creamy.
9. Test the taste, adding salt and black pepper as desired (less than 1/2 teaspoon).
10. Add rice and broccoli mixture to the casserole dish along with the soup mixture.
11. Bake for about 35 minutes. Optionally top with seasoned bread crumbs and Parmesan cheese.
